description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a light-colored facade and a dark, multi-sectioned hip roof. The front features a wide driveway leading to a double garage, flanked by manicured lawns, shrubs, and several mature trees. The main entrance is centrally located, with a covered porch and symmetrical windows on either side. The rear of the house includes expansive green space and a patio area, with large glass doors and windows providing ample natural light. The side and back views reveal a mix of flat and sloped roof sections, as well as additional windows and a fenced perimeter. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a combination of grass, flowering bushes, and privacy fencing.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, light facade, double garage, and landscaped front and rear yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, wide driveway, and landscaped lawn with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, wooden fence, and additional driveway space with more trees and bushes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, patio area, and multiple windows and glass doors for natural light.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, privacy fencing, and a row of trees and bushes along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large glass doors and windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered entry with double doors, steps, and a small porch flanked by columns and decorative landscaping
